scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --outfile dist/main.js --target=node --external electron && bun build src/preload.ts --outfile dist/preload.cjs --target=node --format=cjs --external electron
scripts.test:runtime: bun run build && SYNERGY_DESKTOP_RUNTIME_TEST=1 bun test test/browser-runtime-smoke.test.ts
